name.en: Ekhajar, Descendant Dragon of the Ice Barrier
name.ja: <ruby>氷<rt>ひょう</rt></ruby><ruby>結<rt>けっ</rt></ruby><ruby>界<rt>かい</rt></ruby>の<ruby>龍<rt>りゅう</rt></ruby><ruby>胤<rt>いん</rt></ruby> エクハジャール
name.zh-CN: 冰结界之龙胤 千枪龙

text.en:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners
If this card is Synchro Summoned: You can discard 1 card; banish 2 cards from your opponent's field and/or GY. If your opponent Special Summons a monster(s): You can banish 1 card from your hand; return 1 card in either field or GY to the hand. If this Synchro Summoned card is sent to the GY during your opponent's turn: You can banish 1 card from your opponent's hand (at random), field, or GY. You can only use each effect of "Ekhajar, Descendant Dragon of the Ice Barrier" once per turn.
text.zh-CN:
协调＋协调以外的怪兽1只以上
此卡名的①②③效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：此卡同步召唤的情况下，舍弃1张手牌可以发动。从对手场上・墓地将2张卡除外。②：对手将怪兽特殊召唤的情况下，将1张手牌除外可以发动。从自己或对手的、场上・墓地将1张卡放回手牌。③：同步召唤的此卡在对手回合中被送至墓地的情况下可以发动。从对手手牌・场上・墓地将1张卡除外（从手牌是随机挑选）。
